subcodes.first_line: Verily, the clouds cry out with most exalted call between earth and heaven, saying: "O people! By God, He hath come!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان السحاب ینادی باعلی الندآء بین الارض و السماء و یقول یا قوم تالله قد اتی
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @proclamation to the people of the world, @thankfulness; gratitude, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
